data.content: Implementation review approved on commit aa1951bc2f01. Verified existing shared layout keeps scrollbar gutter stabilization in src/app/globals.css. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree/foolery-44f1: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Browser validation on http://127.0.0.1:3001/beats confirmed stable header geometry across Queues, ReTakes, Diagnostics, and Active: header inner left/right 39.625px/1545.375px, Home button left 56.625px, Diagnostics button left/right 1295.546875px/1426.625px, Add button left/right 1440.375px/1528.375px where present, with no horizontal jitter observed.
